name: Starter Business
description: A complete Drupal 11 starter template for agencies, consulting firms, and businesses. Includes a blog, case studies, service pages, team profiles, testimonials, and flexible landing pages — all pre-configured with Layout Builder and Paragraphs.

screenshots.alt: DrupalReady homepage hero section with headline and navigation
screenshots.caption: Homepage hero with navigation, headline, and Composer install command

screenshots.alt: Template catalog showing three starter templates
screenshots.caption: Template showcase with cards for Business, Government, and Nonprofit

screenshots.alt: Feature grid showing Composer, Drupal 11, Security, Layout Builder, SEO, and Recipes
screenshots.caption: Feature grid highlighting key capabilities

screenshots.alt: Call-to-action banner and footer with navigation links
screenshots.caption: CTA section and organized footer with template, resource, and company links

features.title: 7 Content Types
features.description: Page, Blog Post, Case Study, Service, Team Member, Testimonial, and Landing Page — ready to use.

features.title: 10 Paragraph Components
features.description: Hero banners, card grids, CTAs, FAQ accordions, pricing tables, and more.

features.title: Layout Builder Ready
features.description: Every content type is pre-configured with Layout Builder for drag-and-drop page building.

features.title: SEO Optimized
features.description: Metatag, Pathauto, Simple Sitemap, and Schema.org structured data out of the box.

features.title: Modern Theme
features.description: Clean, responsive corporate theme with blue/slate palette and full-width hero sections.

features.title: Drupal Recipes
features.description: Modular recipes let you enable features independently — blog, portfolio, or commerce.

theme.name: drupalready_business
theme.description: Modern corporate theme — blue/slate palette, clean sans-serif typography, full-width hero sections

name: Starter Government
description: A WCAG 2.2 AA compliant Drupal 11 template for government agencies, municipalities, and educational institutions. Features content moderation workflows, document management, event calendars, department microsites, and emergency alert systems.

screenshots.alt: Government portal homepage with alert banner, navigation, hero section, and popular services
screenshots.caption: Homepage with alert banner, department navigation, and service quick links

screenshots.alt: Popular services section with permits, utilities, meetings, and records cards
screenshots.caption: Quick-access service cards for common citizen needs

screenshots.alt: Latest news and announcements section with article cards
screenshots.caption: News section with date-stamped article cards and summaries

features.title: WCAG 2.2 AA Compliant
features.description: Built with accessibility-first design, targeting AAA where feasible. Includes editoria11y for content auditing.

features.title: Content Moderation
features.description: Draft → In Review → Approved → Published workflow with role-based transitions.

features.title: Document Management
features.description: Full document library with type filtering, search, and PDF export capabilities.

features.title: Department Microsites
features.description: Group module enables department-specific content areas with separate permissions.

features.title: Emergency Alerts
features.description: Site-wide alert banner system for emergency notifications and announcements.

features.title: 8 Content Types
features.description: Pages, news, events, departments, documents, FAQs, public meetings, and alerts.

theme.name: drupalready_government
theme.description: Authoritative, USWDS-inspired — navy/white palette, high contrast, large type scale

name: Starter Nonprofit
description: A people-first Drupal 11 template for nonprofits, charities, clinics, and community organizations. Features impact stories, program showcases, fundraising campaigns, event management, volunteer profiles, and newsletter integration.

screenshots.alt: Nonprofit homepage with teal hero, impact stats, and stories of impact
screenshots.caption: Warm homepage with hero, impact statistics, and featured stories

screenshots.alt: Stories of impact section with education, healthcare, and community cards
screenshots.caption: Impact stories with category tags and photography-forward cards

screenshots.alt: Fundraising campaign with progress bar and donation amount selector
screenshots.caption: Campaign section with progress tracking and donation amounts

features.title: Impact Storytelling
features.description: Beautiful story pages with image galleries, quotes, and infinite scroll listing.

features.title: Fundraising Campaigns
features.description: Campaign pages with progress tracking, goals, and donation call-to-actions.

features.title: Newsletter Integration
features.description: Built-in Mailchimp integration for growing your supporter base.

features.title: Location Mapping
features.description: Service locations with geocoding, interactive maps, and proximity search.

features.title: Program Showcase
features.description: Organized program listings with area-based filtering and detailed pages.

features.title: 8 Content Types
features.description: Stories, programs, events, resources, people, locations, campaigns, and pages.

theme.name: drupalready_nonprofit
theme.description: Warm and human — teal/coral accents, rounded corners, photography-forward design

name: Starter Healthcare
tagline: Modern sites for clinics, practices, and health organizations
description: A patient-first Drupal 11 template for healthcare clinics, medical groups, and wellness organizations. Features provider profiles, appointment booking, service pages, patient resources, and location finder — all HIPAA-conscious and accessibility-compliant.

screenshots.alt: Healthcare clinic homepage with hero, appointment booking, and services grid
screenshots.caption: Homepage with provider hero, appointment CTA, and services overview

screenshots.alt: Services section showing primary care, pediatrics, cardiology, and behavioral health
screenshots.caption: Service cards with icons for each medical specialty

screenshots.alt: Provider directory with doctor profiles and specialties
screenshots.caption: Provider cards with photos, specialties, and credentials

features.title: Provider Profiles
features.description: Doctor and staff profiles with specialties, credentials, education, and appointment links.

features.title: Appointment Booking
features.description: Online appointment request forms with scheduling integration and confirmation workflows.

features.title: Service Pages
features.description: Detailed service and procedure pages organized by medical specialty.

features.title: Patient Resources
features.description: Downloadable forms, insurance info, patient portal links, and health resources.

features.title: Location Finder
features.description: Multi-location office pages with maps, hours, and directions.

features.title: Accessibility First
features.description: WCAG 2.2 AA compliant with high contrast, large touch targets, and screen reader support.

theme.name: drupalready_healthcare
theme.description: Clean, trustworthy — cyan/teal palette, split-hero layout, card-based service showcase

name: Starter Legal
tagline: Professional sites for law firms and legal practices
description: An authoritative Drupal 11 template for law firms, legal practices, and attorneys. Features attorney profiles, practice area pages, case results, client testimonials, and free consultation forms — designed to build trust and convert visitors into clients.

screenshots.caption: Authoritative homepage with consultation CTA and practice area grid

features.description: Professional profiles with practice areas, education, bar admissions, and contact.

features.title: Case Results

features.title: Consultation Forms
features.description: Free consultation request forms with practice area routing and follow-up workflows.

features.title: Legal Blog
features.description: Blog with category filtering for legal insights, news, and thought leadership.

features.title: Trust Signals
features.description: Awards, memberships, testimonials, and track record sections that build credibility.

theme.name: drupalready_legal
theme.description: Authoritative and trustworthy — deep indigo/gold palette, subtle patterns, serif accents

name: Starter SaaS
tagline: Marketing sites for software products and startups
description: A conversion-optimized Drupal 11 template for SaaS products, startups, and tech companies. Features product showcases, pricing tables, feature grids, changelog, documentation hub, customer logos, and CTA-optimized landing pages.
